response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio lyrics and spoken dialogue phonetically match the provided reference context and the song 'ray' by BUMP OF CHICKEN. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the lyrics from the reference JSON during the song segment and manually transcribed/translated the talk segment that followed. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely aligned to start exactly when vocalization begins and end when the line is completed to avoid any cascading delay. No subtitles are generated during the long instrumental segments.

subtitles.original: 悲しい光が僕の影を
subtitles.english: The sad light is stretching my shadow...

subtitles.original: 前に長く伸ばしている
subtitles.english: ...out long in front of me.

subtitles.original: 時々熱が出るよ
subtitles.english: Sometimes I get a fever,

subtitles.original: 時間がある時眠るよ
subtitles.english: and sleep when I have time.

subtitles.original: 夢だと解るその中で
subtitles.english: Inside that dream where I know it's a dream,

subtitles.original: 君と会ってからまた行こう
subtitles.english: let's meet you, then keep going.

subtitles.original: 晴天とはほど遠い
subtitles.english: Far from a clear blue sky,

subtitles.original: 終わらない暗闇にも
subtitles.english: in the endless darkness,

subtitles.original: 星を思い浮かべたなら
subtitles.english: if I picture the stars in my mind,

subtitles.original: すぐ銀河の中だ
subtitles.english: I'm already in the middle of the galaxy.

subtitles.original: あまり泣かなくなっても
subtitles.english: Even if I don't cry as much anymore,

subtitles.original: 靴を新しくしても
subtitles.english: and even if I get new shoes,

subtitles.original: 大丈夫だ あの痛みは
subtitles.english: it's okay, that pain

subtitles.original: 忘れたって消えやしない
subtitles.english: won't disappear even if I forget it.

subtitles.original: 伝えたかった事がきっとあったんだろうな
subtitles.english: There must have been something I wanted to tell you.

subtitles.original: 恐らくありきたりなんだろうけど こんなにも
subtitles.english: It's probably cliché, but I feel it this much.

subtitles.original: お別れした事は
subtitles.english: The fact that we parted

subtitles.original: 出会った事と繋がっている
subtitles.english: is connected to the fact that we met.

subtitles.original: あの透明な彗星は
subtitles.english: That transparent comet

subtitles.original: 透明だから無くならない
subtitles.english: won't disappear because it's transparent.

subtitles.original: ◯×どれかなんて
subtitles.english: Checking to see if it's a circle or an X,

subtitles.original: 皆と比べてどうかなんて保存
subtitles.english: or how I compare to everyone else...

subtitles.original: 確かめる間も無いほど
subtitles.english: I'm so busy living

subtitles.original: 生きるのは最高だ
subtitles.english: I don't have time to check; it's the best.

subtitles.original: あまり泣かなくなっても
subtitles.english: Even if I don't cry as much anymore,

subtitles.original: ごまかして笑っていくよ
subtitles.english: I'll gloss over it and keep laughing.

subtitles.original: 大丈夫だ あの痛みは保存
subtitles.english: It's okay, that pain

subtitles.original: 忘れたって消えやしない
subtitles.english: won't disappear even if I forget it.

subtitles.original: 大丈夫だ この光の
subtitles.english: It's okay, because in the beginning

subtitles.original: 始まりには君がいる
subtitles.english: of this light, you are here.

subtitles.original: はい！ということで、rayでしたー！
subtitles.english: Okay! So, that was 'ray'!

subtitles.original: あー、どうだったですか？
subtitles.english: Ah, how was it?

subtitles.original: めっちゃエモい、エモい、感じになりましたね。はい！
subtitles.english: It became a very emotional, emotional feeling. Yes!

subtitles.original: ちょっと一瞬水飲んでいいですか？
subtitles.english: Can I drink some water for a second?

subtitles.original: 水、水が...
subtitles.english: Water, water...

subtitles.original: うん、お、え
subtitles.english: Yeah, oh, eh...

subtitles.original: あ、ごめん
subtitles.english: Ah, sorry.

subtitles.original: 飲んでも飲んでも減らない水、いいだろ。風真いろは特注だぜ。
subtitles.english: Water that doesn't decrease no matter how much you drink, nice right? It's a Kazama Iroha custom edition.

subtitles.original: よいしょ、ちょっと待って
subtitles.english: Up we go, wait a second...

subtitles.original: おし、はい
subtitles.english: Alright, yes.

subtitles.original: というわけで、次の曲に行きたいと思うんですけど、
subtitles.english: So, I'd like to move on to the next song, but...

subtitles.original: あの、昨日のうた枠でちょっと匂わせしたんですが、本番ですね、
subtitles.english: Um, I hinted at it a bit during yesterday's singing stream, but this is the real deal.

subtitles.original: あの、視聴者参加型3D生ライブになっておりまして、はい、
subtitles.english: This is an audience-participation style 3D live concert! Yes!

subtitles.original: 今回はですね、皆さんに投票をしていただいて、次に歌う曲決めたいと思います！
subtitles.english: So this time, I'd like you all to vote to decide the next song I sing!

subtitles.original: なんじゃそりゃって思うかもしれないんですけど、視聴者参加型曲決め合戦ってことです！
subtitles.english: You might be wondering what that is, but it's an audience-participation song-selection battle!

subtitles.original: それでは、テロップどうぞ！
subtitles.english: So, cue the graphic!

subtitles.original: じゃじゃーん！
subtitles.english: Tada!

subtitles.original: ええ、ANIMAかただ声一つ、どっちか！
subtitles.english: Either 'ANIMA' or 'Tada Koe Hitotsu', which one?!

subtitles.original: で、投票が少なかった方も、この後メンバーシップ限定のアンコールライブで歌いますので、
subtitles.english: And whichever song gets fewer votes will be sung later during the membership-only encore stream,

subtitles.original: よろしくお願いします！いや、どちらも名曲で、迷いますよね。
subtitles.english: so please look forward to it! Gosh, both are great songs, so it's a hard choice.

subtitles.original: 今、スタッフの人とどっちになるかねっていうのを賭けてます！
subtitles.english: Right now, I'm making a bet with the staff on which one it'll be!

subtitles.original: あの、どっちに賭けてるかは言わないんで、さあ、みんな、これで次回の差し入れが豪華になるか、裏で決まるからな！はい！
subtitles.english: I won't say which one I bet on, but everyone, this will decide behind the scenes whether my next catering will be fancy or not! Yes!

subtitles.original: というわけで、早速投票を開始していきたいと思います！大体時間は1分ぐらいですかね？
subtitles.english: So, I'd like to start the voting right away! We have about one minute, right?

subtitles.original: それでは、よーい、スタート！
subtitles.english: Alright, ready... start!
